payload.description:
Create a new non-champion ScoreVersion for CMG Edu Branding and Matching based on the current champion.

Scope:
- Pull current champion configuration
- Rework logic to perform the full YES/NO classification in one LLM request (single decision pass)
- Set model to `gpt-5.4-nano`
- Push as a new ScoreVersion

Definition of Done:
- New ScoreVersion created successfully from champion baseline
- Configuration uses exactly one LLM classification request path
- Model is `gpt-5.4-nano`
- Kanbus log contains command trail and resulting ScoreVersion ID
payload.title: Rearchitect CMG Edu Branding and Matching to single-request gpt-5.4-nano ScoreVersion
